creator: pfeifer@dbai.tuwien.ac.at
text:
PR ports/30786 has a fix for this PR; that is, both PRs can be closed
together, once my patch from

  http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=30786

has been applied.

HTH,
Gerald
